nasb.text: and you will suffer severe sickness, a disease of your bowels, until your bowels come out because of the sickness, day by day.’ ”

esv.text: and you yourself will have a severe sickness with a disease of your bowels, until your bowels come out because of the disease, day by day.’”

cnv.text: 至於你，你的腸臟必患嚴重的病，直到因病情日益嚴重，你的腸子都流出來了。’”

ccb.text: 你必患严重的肠病，并且日益加重，直到你的肠子掉出来。’”
